# ntfy_user (Data Source)

Reads an existing ntfy user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ntfy_user" "example" {
  username = "myuser"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String) The username to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this user (same as username).
- `role` (String) The role of the user (user or admin).
